channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Very Dim streetlight which needs a proper change, 28th March
item.description:
I think Peabody installed this cheap AliExpress solar lamp which barely charges and runs so dim at night, it's causing anti social behaviour to occur around that specific light at night which feels dangerous for everyone in this neighborhood Can Peabody please fix the main lamp in this instead of using Knock off AliExpress solar lamps

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wren Path, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green bin overflowing again, 28th March
item.description:
This green bin is a constant problem for Grove Lane. It is always overflowing and as a result rubbish spills out to the area over 2-8 Grove Lane and we have to clean it up daily. Street sweepers rarely clear the street. This has been a problem for 2 years, please sort it out Southwark Council!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge and Table, 28th March
item.description:
Dumped setchell way junction Curtis street SE1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Curtis Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th March
item.description:
Carpet dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King Edwards Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead dog, 28th March
item.description:
There is a dead dog at Peckham rye station on the tracks to platform 2. I’ve reported this to the station however everyday I am going past a rotting dog corpse and it’s so upsetting and disturbing. If you walk to the end of platform two (towards Denmark hill) you will see the small dog without effort (Jack Russel size). There is another dead similar sized dog in the train tracks between Peckham rye and Denmark hill that’s right over to the right hand side of the track. It’s a bit less noticeable than the dog in platform 2 but still very disturbing as to how two don’t ended up on the train tracks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arch 209, Blenheim Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Just noticed the morning

item.title: Blocking highway, 28th March
item.description:

item.title: Overflowing council bins, 28th March
item.description:
There was no collection last week and these bins are now overflowing and spilling onto the floor.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Contractors have put tarmac over the cycle lane on the roundabout and forgot to put the white line cycle lane markings back. Cycle lane road markings need repainting where the contractors have tarmac over., 28th March
item.description:
Contractors have put tarmac over the cycle lane on the roundabout and forgot to put the white line cycle lane markings back. Cycle lane road markings need repainting where the contractors have tarmac over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping still there...not closed., 28th March
item.description:
